name: DOEH Identity
description: Let website visitors sign in with their DOEH customer identity (hosted OAuth 2.1 + PKCE) and see a protected member area — sign-in and a read-only loyalty dashboard. Wallet and profile are handed off to DOEH-hosted pages, never rendered here. A browser-only public client: no customer tokens ever touch the CMS server.
description_mm: ဝဘ်ဆိုက်လာရောက်သူများကို ၎င်းတို့၏ DOEH customer identity ဖြင့် (hosted OAuth 2.1 + PKCE) ဝင်ရောက်ခွင့်ပြုပြီး ကာကွယ်ထားသော member area — sign-in နှင့် ဖတ်ရုံ loyalty dashboard — ကို ပြသပေးသည်။ Wallet နှင့် profile ကို DOEH-hosted စာမျက်နှာများသို့ လွှဲပြောင်းပေးပြီး ဤနေရာတွင် မ render ပါ။ Browser-only public client — customer token များ CMS server ကို ဘယ်တော့မှ မထိပါ။
author: Beyond Plus

settings.name: environment
settings.label: Environment
settings.help: Selects the DOEH Identity issuer and consumer API. Sandbox = auth-sandbox.doehpos.com; Production = auth.doehpos.com.

settings.name: client_id
settings.label: OAuth Client ID
settings.help: The app_… client id issued for THIS website (one DOEH Application per merchant site). Public value.

settings.name: publishable_key
settings.label: Publishable Key
settings.help: The pk_test_… / pk_live_… key issued for this shop. Publishable by design — it grants nothing without the customer's sign-in.

settings.name: enabled
settings.label: Enable sign-in
settings.help: When off, the widgets render nothing (kill switch without deactivating the plugin).
